product_overview: FUD.ai is an API-first, agent-to-agent crypto sentiment oracle that analyzes small-cap token FUD, manipulation, and rugpull signals. It accepts on-chain paid requests via CROO, ingests market and social data, and returns structured JSON verdicts for downstream bot clients, with a read-only landing page and live dashboard for visibility.
core_goals: Provide a pay-per-call CROO-gated analysis API for bot clients
Detect and summarize crypto FUD, whale manipulation, and rugpull risk from social and on-chain sources
Optimize operational cost with 3-engine task routing and 5-minute semantic caching
Return actionable, explainable JSON verdicts with evidence chains
Offer a read-only landing page, API documentation, pricing, and live dashboard
Maintain mobile-responsive dashboard rendering for hackathon/demo usage

features.name: FUD Analysis API
features.description: Primary backend endpoint that executes the analysis pipeline for a requested crypto token and returns a structured verdict JSON.
user_flows: POST /api/agent with valid coin_symbol, contract_address, and chain_id -> Receive 200 with request_id, drama_index, dominant_branch, branch_probabilities, evidence_chain, executable_verdict, and served_from_cache=false -> Downstream bot consumes verdict JSON for decision-making
POST /api/agent with same coin_symbol within cache TTL -> Receive 200 with served_from_cache=true and cached verdict payload -> No new analysis pipeline execution required
POST /api/agent with malformed or missing request body fields -> Receive 400 with error message describing invalid input
POST /api/agent when internal reasoning pipeline fails -> Receive 500 with drama_index, executable_verdict, error, and fallback=true for resilience handling

features.name: CROO Payment Gating and Request Activation
features.description: Ensures the analysis pipeline only proceeds when the client's USDC payment is confirmed on-chain through the CROO protocol listener.
user_flows: POST /api/agent after client payment is confirmed on-chain -> Listener validates the transaction and activates analysis -> Receive 200 with analysis verdict JSON
POST /api/agent before payment confirmation is available -> Request is rejected by the gateway logic -> Receive 400 or equivalent error response indicating payment validation failure
POST /api/agent with payment transaction that fails confirmation checks -> Gateway blocks pipeline execution -> Receive 400 with error describing unconfirmed or invalid transaction
POST /api/agent with confirmed payment but subsequent processing error -> Receive 500 with fallback verdict fields where available

features.name: Semantic Cache for Repeated Coin Requests
features.description: Reduces latency and cost by returning stored verdicts for the same token within a 5-minute window instead of rerunning model inference.
user_flows: POST /api/agent for a coin that has no recent cached result -> Pipeline executes normally and stores verdict in cache -> Receive 200 with served_from_cache=false
POST /api/agent for the same coin within 5 minutes -> Cache hit returns previously stored JSON immediately -> Receive 200 with served_from_cache=true and identical verdict structure
POST /api/agent for a coin after cache TTL expires -> Cache miss triggers fresh ingestion and reasoning -> Receive 200 with served_from_cache=false and updated result
POST /api/agent with cache lookup failure or Redis unavailable -> System falls back to live analysis pipeline -> Receive 200 or 500 depending on downstream execution outcome

features.name: Three-Engine Reasoning Pipeline
features.description: Splits work across lightweight, vision, and heavyweight LLM engines to reduce cost while producing an explainable scenario-tree verdict.
user_flows: POST /api/agent with a supported token request -> Lightweight engine summarizes ingestion data, heavyweight engine performs hypothesis rollout and validation, then lightweight engine formats final JSON -> Receive 200 with drama_index, branch_probabilities, evidence_chain, and executable_verdict

POST /api/agent with media-bearing social inputs -> Vision engine processes images or memes, heavy engine incorporates findings into reasoning, and final JSON is returned -> Receive 200 with media-informed evidence chain

POST /api/agent when one engine times out or errors -> Pipeline logs the failure and attempts graceful degradation or fallback handling -> Receive 500 with fallback=true if final verdict cannot be completed
POST /api/agent for a token requiring only cached finalization -> Skip expensive inference steps and return cached formatted output -> Receive 200 with served_from_cache=true

features.name: Landing Page, API Docs, and Live Dashboard
features.description: Public read-only web experience that explains the product, pricing model, CROO integration, and displays live analysis results for demonstration.
user_flows: GET landing page route with a browser -> Receive documentation content, pricing information, and live dashboard sections -> User can review API usage and sample JSON without interacting with a chatbot
GET live dashboard data view after analysis results are available -> Dashboard renders drama index, scenario tree, and evidence chain -> User sees near-real-time status updates from the backend API
GET landing page on mobile device -> Dashboard and JSON text reflow responsively without overflow -> Receive usable mobile layout for demo
GET dashboard when API data fetch fails -> Show graceful error state or empty state instead of breaking layout -> User can still access the rest of the landing page content

features.name: FUD Analysis API
features.description: Stress-tests and analyzes sentiment and market factors for small cap crypto tokens

endpoints.description: Execute the MCTS reasoning pipeline on a coin
